programme.title: Day 1 - Al Shaqab Cup 2026
programme.desc: The Al Shaqab Cup is a prestigious equestrian event held in Doha from 25 to 29 March 2026, bringing together elite international riders and top-level horses in high-caliber competition. Staged at the world-class Al Shaqab venue, the event showcases the sport’s excellence and international appeal through a program of top-class equestrian action.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The program includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, where riders earn ranking points toward the season standings. Competition takes place at altitude, impacting horse performance and pace.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 23 - Mini Match
programme.desc: Arsenal have won each of their last four Premier League home games against Manchester United, the longest home winning run against them by any side in the competition. programme.title: Everton vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Everton have lost their last eight home league games against Manchester City, their longest run of consecutive defeats against an opponent in their history. Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 17 Premier League games against Everton, since a 4-0 loss in January 2017.

programme.title: UEL & UECL Magazine 2025/26 Ep.22 UEL Season Review
programme.desc: Review of the UEFA Europa League Season.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 15 - Mini Match
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. Arsenal have won their last two away league games against West Ham, winning 6-0 in 2023-24 and 5-2 last season. In English league history, only West Brom have scored 5+ goals in three consecut

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: EN UCL Magazine 2025/26 | E36
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Hull City vs Middlesbrough - Championship Playoff Final - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - Ch
programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage only on beIN of the 2025–2026 EFL Championship. The EFL Championship is the second tier in the English Football league system. The season will run from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: Paris SG and Arsenal will be facing each other for the eighth time in all competitions, with their head-to-head record perfectly balanced at two wins each and three draws. programme.title: Race 1 - Nurburgring Round - ADAC GT Masters - 2026
programme.desc: ADAC GT Masters heads to the Nürburgring as part of the ADAC Truck Grand Prix weekend for a competitive round on the Sprint track. With a mix of technical corners, braking zones, and close GT racing, teams and drivers will need strong pace, strategy, and consistency to fight for valuable championship points.

programme.title: Race 1 - FIA European Truck Championship - Nurburgring Round
programme.desc: Five-ton race trucks storm the 4.185 km Bugatti Circuit in four combative sprints. With a 160 km/h speed cap and over 1,000 hp, braking into the Dunlop Chicane and traction out of Garage Vert are decisive. Points across Races 1–4 shape the title chase, while contact and track-limits penalties punish errors. Expect rolling starts, tight packs, and s

With a 160 km/h speed cap and over 1,000 hp, braking into the Dunlop Chicane and traction out of Garage Vert are decisive. programme.desc: Chelsea have won their last four Premier League games against West Ham by an aggregate score of 15-2. Scotland and Brazil’s first FIFA World Cup encounter was in 1974, ending in a goalless draw. Since then, Brazil have won their last three matches against Scotland at the tournament.

programme.title: Jordan vs Algeria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Jordan and Algeria’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their last encounter was a friendly in Algeria in May 2004 – it ended 1-1. programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. Six of Germany’s seven goals against Ecuador have come in the first half, including Lukas Podolski scoring after nine seconds in their last meeting in May 2013.

programme.title: Türkiye vs United States - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Türkiye and USA are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Türkiye and USA’s five previous encounters have produced a perfectly balanced record of two wins each and one draw, with seven goals scored by each side. programme.title: Croatia vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Croatia and Ghana. Croatia are unbeaten in their four FIFA World Cup matches against African sides, scoring eight goals and conceding just one.

programme.title: Algeria vs Austria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Algeria and Austria’s only previous encounter was in the group stage of the 1982 FIFA World Cup – Austria won 2-0, which was their last clean sheet at the tournament.
